Description: Epic. Build the knowledge content pack the agent retrieves from: company rules/regulations plus the who-owns-what ownership map and directory. Authored by interns with HR / IT / department-head input.

WHAT: Design the JSON schema every knowledge source uses. PolicyDoc fields: id, title, category, audience, language, body, source, owning_department, last_updated. ResponsibilityArea fields: id, topic, keywords, owning_department, primary_contact, contact_channel, notes.
DEPENDS ON: Nothing. Do this FIRST - it blocks all content and ingestion work.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: Schema documented in docs/. One example file per type validates against it. Categories are an agreed, fixed enum.

WHAT: With HR/IT, collect and structure the rules - attendance/hours, dress code, annual leave & benefits, code of conduct, IT/email/apps, facilities. Bilingual (Arabic/English) allowed.
DEPENDS ON: KB-1.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: At least 1 doc per category. Each has a real 'source' citation and an owning_department. All files validate against the schema.

WHAT: Map concerns to owners - e.g. laptop to IT, payslip/leave to HR, meeting room/access card/parking to Admin, CRM to Sales Ops. This is what powers 'who do I ask?'.
DEPENDS ON: KB-1.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: At least 10 responsibility areas. Each has an owning_department, a contact person or role, and keywords. Validates against the schema.

WHAT: With HR, produce departments.json (name, description, head) and employees.json (name, role, department, email, is_contact_person).
DEPENDS ON: Nothing.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: Every employee.department exists in departments.json. Contact persons flagged. Emails present but treated as sensitive (see AGENT-5 PII-gating).

WHAT: Curate common new-hire questions with grounded answers, general and per-department, in Arabic and English.
DEPENDS ON: KB-1.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: At least 20 Q/A pairs, each tagged with owning_department and language.

WHAT: A checklist and process for an owner (HR/IT/dept head) to approve content before it is indexed, plus a last-reviewed date on each doc.
DEPENDS ON: KB-2.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: Written checklist in docs/. Every published doc has an approver and a review date.
Epic. The relational directory (departments, employees, responsibility areas) in Postgres, plus its models, seed loader, and local dev database.

WHAT: ERD and DDL for the relational directory.
DEPENDS ON: KB-4 (need the real fields).
LEVEL: Mid.
DONE WHEN: Tables have primary/foreign keys and referential integrity (employee.department references department). Migration applies cleanly on a fresh database.

WHAT: SQLAlchemy/SQLModel models plus engine/session helpers, fully typed.
FILES: src/onboard_agent/database/ (align with existing postgres.py/schema.py).

LEVEL: Mid.
DONE WHEN: Models mirror the schema. mypy strict passes. A simple query test runs against a test database.

WHAT: Idempotent loader that reads the directory JSON and upserts into Postgres.
DEPENDS ON: DATA-2.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: Re-running produces no duplicates. Row counts equal source counts. Referential integrity holds.

WHAT: Compose service with a healthcheck and a named volume.
DEPENDS ON: Nothing.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: 'docker compose up' gives a reachable Postgres. DSN documented and matches config defaults.
Epic. Turn the validated content pack into a searchable vector store: self-hosted BGE-M3 embeddings, a Franko normalizer, chunking with metadata, and the end-to-end indexing pipeline into Qdrant.

WHAT: Run Qdrant (docker) and create the collection with the correct vector size (1024 for BGE-M3) and distance metric.
DEPENDS ON: Nothing.
LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: Collection exists with dim=1024. Connection settings match config. Documented.

WHAT: Wrap the self-hosted BGE-M3 model to embed text. Self-hosted was chosen so employee PII / policy text never leaves our infra.
DEPENDS ON: Nothing.
LEVEL: Mid.
DONE WHEN: Given Arabic and English strings it returns 1024-dim vectors. Batch API. Device configurable (cpu/gpu). Unit test on sample text.

WHAT: Rule/dictionary-based normalizer that converts common Franko (Arabizi) to Arabic BEFORE retrieval. This is the fallback so retrieval never depends solely on the LLM understanding Arabizi.
DEPENDS ON: Nothing.
LEVEL: Mid.
DONE WHEN: Unit tests over a sample Franko set map correctly (e.g. '3ayez a3raf el agaza' to its Arabic form). Coverage and known gaps documented.

WHAT: Chunk policy bodies and tag each chunk with metadata: type (policy|ownership), source, owning_department, language.

LEVEL: Junior.
DONE WHEN: Chunks carry all metadata fields. Size/overlap configurable. Ownership records are indexed whole, not split.

WHAT: End-to-end pipeline: load validated pack, chunk, embed, upsert to Qdrant with metadata.

LEVEL: Mid.
DONE WHEN: Idempotent re-index (stable ids). Run logs counts. A query returns the seeded docs.
Epic. The agentic core: local LLM served via vLLM, the four tools, language detection + Franko rewrite, the LangGraph tool-calling loop, and the grounding system prompt.

WHAT: Prompt enforcing: answer ONLY from tool results; reply in the user's language including Franko; always cite the source or escalate; never use parametric knowledge for policy. Critical because the flow is agentic - guardrails carry the weight.

DONE WHEN: On a question with no supporting content the agent escalates instead of guessing (verified in eval).
